scripts.install:all: cd my-app && pnpm install && cd ../espace-etudiant && pnpm install && cd ../Auth && pnpm install
scripts.dev:all: concurrently --names "site,etudiant,auth" --prefix-colors "blue,green,yellow" "npm run dev --prefix my-app" "npm run dev --prefix espace-etudiant" "pnpm --prefix Auth dev"
